name: Sports Direct (Frasers Group)
best_contact_role: Customer Services (head office routed to Michael Murray office)
why_target: UK's largest sporting goods retailer; will be the dominant high-street destination for WC2026 Adidas Trionda match ball, Nike Three Lions home/away kit, and every other competing-nation jersey; mass jersey + boot inventory across Nike, adidas, Puma, Karrimor, Slazenger, Everlast, USA Pro
notes: Owned by Frasers Group plc (LSE: FRAS). HQ Unit A, Brook Park East, Shirebrook, Mansfield, NG20 8RY. CEO Michael Murray (since 1 May 2022). Group also owns Lillywhites, Flannels, House of Fraser, Evans Cycles, GAME, Jack Wills, Sofa.com. Press: press@frasers.group. Best escalation via head-office switchboard 0344 245 9200.

name: JD Sports
why_target: UK's biggest sneaker + sportswear specialist; ~500 UK doors and the dominant Nike/adidas football boot floor space outside of brand stores; carries every WC2026 replica kit Nike + adidas drop; flagship 'The King of Trainers' positioning sells the WC2026 streetwear collabs
notes: Listed JD Sports Fashion plc (LSE: JD.). HQ Hollinsbrook Way, Pilsworth, Bury, BL9 8RR. Pentland Group is 55% owner. Group also owns Size?, Footpatrol, Scotts, Tessuti, Blacks, Millets, GO Outdoors, Hip Store. CEO Régis Schultz. Investor relations corporate.communications@jdplc.com.

name: Decathlon UK
regions: UK-wide (London Surrey Quays flagship, Croydon, Manchester, Reading, Sheffield and ~40 doors)

notes: UK HQ 9 Surrey Quays Road, London SE16 2XU. Parent Decathlon SE (private, controlled by Mulliez family). Press in UK comms@decathlon.com. Strong grassroots tie-in via Kipsta football academy partnerships.

name: Foot Locker UK

notes: Parent Foot Locker Inc (NYSE: FL). EMEA HQ in Vianen, Netherlands; UK ops run by EMEA team. No published UK marketing email; submit via Help Center. Sister formats Kids Foot Locker + Champs Sports.

name: Pro:Direct Sport
regions: UK + global online + Clarks Village outlet (Street

phone: Pro-Direct Sport Limited (registered 04245687). HQ Torre House, Shaldon Road, Newton Abbot, Devon, TQ12 4PQ. Outlet at Clarks Village. Offices in France, Germany, Italy, Spain, Atlanta GA. Ships to 200+ countries.

name: Pro:Direct Soccer

name: Lillywhites

name: Footpatrol

name: Footasylum

name: Schuh

name: Classic Football Shirts
